The '''Leozi Route''' was a minor [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The route was under the jurisdiction of [[House Mecetti]] as it was entirely contained in their [[Mecetti Province|province]] and connected almost a third of the worlds they controlled together. Travel along this route was especially quick due to a minimal amount of debris along the run.

The Leozi Route was a spur of the larger [[Procopian Shipping Lane]], splitting of from it at [[Javis]] at passing through [[Tanya]], [[Tanzis system/Legends|Tanzis]] and [[Pozzi system/Legends|Pozzi]] before reaching its terminus at [[Tanda system/Legends|Tanda system]].
